description:
The Scene 003 
This one was special — it was the first time we brought out @notredindia , a joint audio-visual project between me and @siddhii.sawant_ . It’s our little world of sound and visuals coming together the way we feel them.
Still early days, but this was the first step — and it felt right.

Shared the night with @dj_ansn , @magnimus__ , and @devaamsh.rajesh as part of the @magnimusik crew — and @devaamsh.rajesh absolutely delivered with a closing set that shook the walls.

Big love to everyone who came through, danced hard, and stayed with us through the whole ride. You made it worth it.❤️

Photos: @mk_studiox 
.
.
.
.
.

visual_description.subject: Two hands raised upward in a dark smoky environment, one gripping the stem of a single rose held aloft
visual_description.composition: Vertical frame, low-angle perspective with hands and rose rising from the lower third into a red-hazed, near-black background
visual_description.palette: deep crimson, near-black, burgundy, dark scarlet
visual_description.lighting: diffused red atmospheric haze with no defined directional source
visual_description.materials_visible: possible ring or bracelet with small red-lit detail on left wrist
visual_description.human_presence: two hands and partial forearms visible
